config.inventoryessentials.title: Inventory Essentials
config.inventoryessentials.forceClientIm: Use the client implementation even on servers that have the mod installed - only useful for development purposes.
config.inventoryessentials.allowBulkTran: Allow Transfer All on Empty Slot
Should Transfer All move all items even if an empty slot was clicked?
config.inventoryessentials.bulkTransferA: Should space-clicking armor in the inventory swap to all matching armor?
config.inventoryessentials.enableSingleT: Should ctrl-clicking only move one item at a time instead of the full stack?
config.inventoryessentials.enableBulkTra: Should shift-ctrl-clicking move all items of the same type at once?
Should control-space-clicking an item move one of each item from that inventory at once?
Should space-clicking an item move all items from that inventory at once?
config.inventoryessentials.enableBulkDro: Should shift-ctrl-drop-clicking drop all items of the same type at once?
config.inventoryessentials.enableShiftDr: Should holding shift and moving your mouse over items quick-transfer them without requiring each to be clicked?
config.inventoryessentials.enableMiddleC: Should middle-clicking a slot sort the inventory?
